manifest.description: Synchronize properties from your notes with a Markwhen timeline file
manifest.name: Markwhen File Sync

name: Markwhen File Sync

releases.author: rouvenjahnke
releases.description:
- Header preservation: Keeps any existing header at the top of your Markwhen file. If a header is set in settings, that value overrides the file’s header.
- Whole‑vault sync: Leave “Notes folder path” blank to sync your entire vault. Watchers and excludes respect this scope; excludes are relative to the vault root in this mode.
- Partial dates support: Events with year/month only (e.g., 2025 or 2025‑06) are supported and no longer removed. They expand to start/ end of the period using your configured date format.
- Safer reverse sync: When syncing from Markwhen, updates are skipped if multiple notes share the same basename in whole‑vault mode, avoiding unintended edits.
- Consistent date validation: Reverse sync now validates against your configured date format (not hardcoded).
- UX/docs: Settings descriptions and README updated to reflect these changes.

releases.author: rouvenjahnke
releases.description: The final first version of this plugin.

releases.author: rouvenjahnke
releases.description:
First Beta-release of Markwhen File Sync featuring:
- Bidirectional synchronization
- Custom grouping options
- Filtering capabilities
- Auto-sync functionality
- Status tag support

**Some features may not work on all devices yet.**
releases.name: Beta-Upload
